case_title: BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. VS. LEANN CORPUZ

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'S MOTION TO VACATE DISMISSAL AND ENTER JUDGMENT UNDER TERMS OF STIPULATED SETTLEMENT. THE REQUEST TO TAKE JUDICIAL NOTICE OF THE STIPULATION AGREEMENT FILED JANUARY 10, 2025 IS GRANTED. THE UNOPPOSED MOTION TO VACATE DISMISSAL AND ENTER JUDGMENT UNDER TERMS OF STIPULATED SETTLEMENT PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 664.6 IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF SHALL SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER AND A SEPERATE FORM OF JUDGMENT. VISITING JUDGE: CINDEE MAYFIELD; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (301/CM)

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-16-2026 Continued To Aug-18-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Kenneth Tsang, Esq. specially appeared for the plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to Aug-18-2026 at 10:30am in Department 610 for plaintiff to file judgment per Nov-5-2025 ruling. Judge: Rochelle East; Clerk: B. Xu; Not reported. (610)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-13-2026 Continued To Jun-16-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion To Vacate Dismissal And Enter Judgment Under Terms Of Stipulated Settlement
Off Calendar Nov-05-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s Motion To Vacate Dismissal And Enter Judgment Under Terms Of Stipulated Settlement.

The request to take judicial notice of the Stipulation Agreement filed January 10, 2025 is granted.

The unopposed motion to vacate dismissal and enter judgment under terms of stipulated settlement pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure 664.6 is granted. Plaintiff shall submit a proposed order and a seperate form of judgment.

Visiting Judge: Cindee Mayfield; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CM)
